name: web-app/ts-hono-api
description: TypeScript on Node 22 — Hono HTTP API with Better Auth, better-sqlite3, and Stripe. SaaS back-end surface (ADR-0012).
_note: Catalog is the fixed 7 (ADR-0005/0009). Back-end API profile; MiniMax M3 (multimodal) stays unbound — UI work lives in web-app/react-vite. dispatch.sh reads roles.implementer + roles.verifier and enforces P8; specs may pin models explicitly (the Shrink specs do).
